commands.repair_reason: Maintainers need to decide the Production secret runner boundary, and the contributor needs to repair priority ordering plus add real behavior proof.; Needs attention: The diff moves a Production workflow that holds scanner and OpenAI secrets onto a different runner trust boundary without visible approval.; Review finding: [P1] Keep production secrets on an approved runner — .github/workflows/security-scan-codex.yml... (sha=e952faf3a9e87d9438d8b318e75057dd9917d9e9)
commands.review_summary:
This PR shards the Codex security scan workflow across eight scheduled workers, lowers the per-shard batch size, raises the global active scan cap, changes queued-job claim ordering, adds an index, and extends tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the priority-ordering defect from source inspection: active jobs preserve priority while allowing source overwrite, but the new claim path buckets by source without reapplying priority. The runner-secret concern is a static workflow security review rather than a runtime reproduction.
commands.review_followup: Maintainers need to decide the Production secret runner boundary, and the contributor needs to repair priority ordering plus add real behavior proof.

target.title: fix: increase security scan worker throughput
target.body:
## Summary
- shard the Codex security scan workflow across 8 Blacksmith workers every 5 minutes, with 6 scans per shard and shard-specific diagnostics
- prioritize manual rescans and malicious-signal jobs ahead of older backlog, then claim clawscan-note/backfill/publish/vt-update buckets
- raise the global active Codex scan cap to 64 and cover claim ordering/cap behavior in tests

## Tests
- `bunx vitest run convex/securityScan.test.ts scripts/security/run-codex-scan-worker.test.ts`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/clawhub/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `bun run format:check -- .github/workflows/security-scan-codex.yml convex/schema.ts convex/securityScan.ts convex/securityScan.test.ts scripts/security/run-codex-scan-worker.ts && git diff --check`
- `go run github.com/rhysd/actionlint/cmd/actionlint@latest .github/workflows/security-scan-codex.yml`

Note: `bun run ci:static` currently fails on an unrelated formatting issue in `convex/lib/securityPrompt.test.ts`, which this PR does not touch.
target.author: patrick-erichsen

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
